title: Consultation: Electronic media in prescription drug labelling draft guidance document - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation: Electronic media in prescription drug labelling draft guidance document

## Current status: Closed
This consultation ran from March 12, 2021 to May 7, 2021.
Comments were requested on the draft  guidance .

## Who was the focus of this consultation
Health Canada engaged with:
- health professionals
- other interested parties
Bureau of Policy, Science and International Programs Therapeutic Products Directorate Health Canada 1600 Scott Street Holland Cross, Tower B 2nd Floor, Address Locator 3102C5 Ottawa, Ontario K1A 0K9 E-mail: hc.policy.bureau.enquiries.sc@canada.ca
